seed_instruction: I'm an undergraduate student, and I want to ask a professor if I can do some research with them in molecular biology. Please help me write them an email.
org_constraint: The first paragraph must begin with the phrase "I hope this email finds you well."
new_constraint: The first paragraph must start with a quote from a famous person.
instruction: I'm an undergraduate student, and I want to ask a professor if I can do some research with them in molecular biology. Please help me write them an email. The first paragraph must begin with the phrase "I hope this email finds you well." The first paragraph must start with a quote from a famous person.
response:
Subject: Undergraduate Research Inquiry - [Your Name]

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

"Somewhere, something incredible is waiting to be known." — Carl Sagan. I hope this email finds you well. My name is [Your Name], and I am a [Year, e.g., Sophomore] student majoring in [Your Major] at [University Name]. I have been following your work regarding [mention a specific topic they study, e.g., CRISPR gene editing or protein folding], and I am deeply fascinated by your recent publication on [mention a specific paper or project of theirs].

I am writing to express my strong interest in contributing to your research group as an undergraduate research assistant. I have completed coursework in [mention 2-3 relevant classes, e.g., Genetics, Biochemistry, and Cell Biology], which has provided me with a solid theoretical foundation in molecular biology. I am particularly eager to gain hands-on experience in [mention a specific technique or area, e.g., PCR, gel electrophoresis, or cell culture] and to learn how these processes are applied to solve complex biological questions.

I am highly motivated, detail-oriented, and eager to contribute to the ongoing projects in your lab. I have attached my resume and unofficial transcript for your review. Would you be available for a brief meeting sometime next week to discuss any potential openings in your lab and how I might be able to contribute to your team?

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Student ID Number]
[Your Phone Number]<turn|>
